name: io.github.blackhatshiftey/seam-runtime
description: SEAM local-first memory runtime for AI agents: persistent lossless memory, prompt-ready context retrieval, and glassbox provenance over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: SEAM_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the local SQLite memory database. Defaults to a per-user data directory if unset.

environmentVariables.name: SEAM_PGVECTOR_DSN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Postgres/pgvector DSN for the vector adapter. If unset, SEAM runs on the built-in SQLite vector store.
